_comment: SHA-256 hashes of immutable bundle files, pinned at creation date. CI must verify these before running any analysis on bundle data. Hashes were computed from the files as committed. Any mismatch signals data tampering or unintended modification.

data_real_v2/oric_inputs/oric_inputs_pan.description: 5-country (BE, DE, EE, EU27_2020, FR) annual panel, O/R/I/S normalised to [0,1], 1981-2024

data_real_v2/manifest.json.description: Manifest describing raw Eurostat sources and processing pipeline for v2

data_real_v1/oric_inputs/oric_inputs_pan.description: Identical to v2 panel (v1 and v2 share the same oric_inputs extraction)

policy: Any CI run using bundle data MUST pass integrity check before proceeding. Failure = abort run, flag as TAMPERED.
